name: Rem Survival
short_description: Scavenge abandoned ruins, craft gear from scrap and salvaged materials, and fight the environment itself as hunger, exposure, and exhaustion push you to your limits. There are no second chances—only adaptation or death.
detailed_description:
Survive the collapse. Every choice matters.

REM Survival is a post-apocalyptic survival experience where exploration, crafting, and progression are key. Play solo or online in co-op, PvE, or PvP as you scavenge resources, build dynamic bases, craft weapons and vehicles, and survive a hostile world filled with mutated enemies, radiation zones, and forgotten technology. Manage hunger, thirst, temperature, and skills while farming, cooking, researching lost tech, completing quests, and competing for high-value airdrops in a living world with dynamic weather and day-night cycles.

This is survival stripped back to its raw core.

What Makes REM Surivial Different

  • Brutal survival systems
    Manage hunger, thirst, stamina, temperature, and health in a world that does not forgive careless decisions.

  • Crafting from trash & salvage
    Turn broken, discarded materials into tools, armor, and survival equipment. Every item has value—nothing is useless.

  • Harsh consequences
    Poor planning can cost you everything. Death is punishing, and survival means learning from failure.

  • Atmospheric post-apocalyptic world
    Explore a desolate environment filled with abandoned structures, decaying technology, and environmental hazards.

  • Progression through mastery
    Start weak and vulnerable. Become efficient, prepared, and capable through experience—not hand-holding.

Play Your Way — But Pay the Price

There are no scripted solutions.
No guaranteed safety.
No easy mode survival.

Whether you build a secure shelter, roam endlessly for loot, or live on the edge scavenging high-risk locations, every decision shapes how long you survive.

Who This Game Is For

✔ Fans of hardcore survival games
✔ Players who enjoy slow, tense, atmospheric gameplay
✔ Gamers who prefer systems over hand-holding
✖ Not recommended for players looking for fast action or casual survival

Core Features

  • Multiple Game Modes
    Play solo or with others in locally or dedicated hosted Single-player, Co-op, PvE, and PvP modes.

  • Crafting System
    Build workbenches and use specialized tools to unlock recipes and increase crafting success.

  • Vehicle Construction
    Design, build, and drive your own vehicles using scavenged parts.

  • Character Skills & Attributes
    Level up survival skills and stats to adapt your playstyle and increase survivability.

  • Dynamic Base Building
    Construct and upgrade bases using multiple material tiers for defense and utility.

  • Dynamic Weather System
    Experience changing weather conditions including thunderstorms, fog, and light rain.

  • Weapon Attachments
    Customize weapons with red-dot sights and other attachments to improve combat effectiveness.

  • Resource Harvesting
    Gather a wide variety of resources from the environment to craft, build, and survive.

  • Hostile NPCs
    Encounter wildlife, mutated humans, and elite enemy types throughout the world.

  • Farming System
    Grow food using garden beds, compost bins, and greenhouses.

  • Cooking System
    Prepare meals using campfires, stoves, pots, and grills to sustain your character.

  • Smelting & Refining
    Process raw materials using furnaces, progressing from stone to iron.

  • Day & Night Cycle
    A full world cycle that affects visibility, temperature, and gameplay.

  • Survival Needs
    Manage hunger, thirst, stamina, and thermal conditions to stay alive.

  • Dynamic Temperature System
    Temperature changes based on time of day and seasonal conditions.

  • Clothing & Gadgets
    Equip clothing and gadgets that affect protection, temperature, and utility.

  • Clan System
    Form clans to share base access, items, and collaborate with other players.

  • Power Construction
    Connect to an existing power grid or generate and manage your own power systems.

  • Quest System
    Discover random loot quests across the island to earn valuable rewards.

  • Airdrop Events
    Compete for high-value airdrops with three different loot tiers.

  • Dynamic Loot Spawns
    Explore towns and forests with randomized loot locations each playthrough.

  • Radiation Zones & Bunkers
    Enter dangerous radiation areas and underground bunkers for rare loot and secrets.

  • Blueprints & Schematics
    Find and learn blueprints to unlock advanced crafting and building options.

  • Research System
    Recover forgotten technology and essential items needed to survive in a broken world.

DISCLAIMER (PLEASE READ)

Early Access is intended for those interested in supporting the project and participating in its continued development. You will most likely experience balancing issues, performance issues, latency issues, bugs and incomplete features. I will try my best to target latency issues to improve the quality of online gameplay the best I can. If you are looking for a complete gaming experience this may not be for you, I would recommend watching some recent YouTube videos showing the current state of the game. Rem Survival has been solely developed by myself, and I've always taken passion in working on it, I feel this is important to mention, so those considering purchasing Early Access can make a more informed decision.

Goals of the project:

The aim was to create a game that wasn't overly complicated but also provided a strategy-based experience that offered challenges and an overall goal and purpose to playing, rather than just looting and shooting. I wanted the game to be as balanced as possible in PvP while also offering decent PvE content.

supported_languages:
English*, Danish*, Russian*, Spanish - Spain*, Turkish*, Ukrainian*, French*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Simplified Chinese*, German*
*languages with full audio support
